verses.3: His work is honor and majesty.
verses.4: He has caused his wonderful works to be remembered.
verses.5: He has given food to those who fear him.
verses.6: He has shown his people the power of his works,
verses.7: The works of his hands are truth and justice.
verses.8: They are established forever and ever.
verses.9: He has sent redemption to his people.
verses.10: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom.
